title: RefactorWriteOutput
description: Output of 'refactor write'. On success (ok=true): table, writer, catalog_path are all present. On failure (ok=false): error is present instead of writer/catalog_path.

ok.description: True on success, false on validation or IO failure.

table.description: Normalised FQN of the target table.

writer.description: Normalised FQN of the writer procedure. Present when ok is true.

catalog_path.description: Absolute path to the updated procedure catalog file. Present when ok is true.

error.description: Error message. Present when ok is false.
